title: Kerala High Court directs Registry to identify advocates who misled court in bank de-freezing cases
description: The Kerala High Court on Wednesday directed its Registry to identify advocates who have misled the Court to secure relief in petitions for de-freezing bank accounts tied to cybercrime cases [Kerala High Court Advocates' Association (KHCAA) v Suo Motu JPP Proceedings initiated by the High Court].Such misuse of the High Court's writ jurisdiction had recently led the Court to make police verification of the litigant's identity compulsory, before any petition to de-freeze bank accounts is entertaine
